visual_description: A man with gray hair, wearing a light-colored shirt and tie, sits at a table eating from a white bowl with chopsticks, while another man in a dark suit is partially visible beside him. The scene appears to be a dimly lit dining area with other people seated around, some blurred in the background. The man eating looks down at his food, holding chopsticks mid-motion, while the man beside him is turned away, partially obscuring the view.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a steady pace and moderate pitch, accompanied by the sound of footsteps and ambient background noise.
